purpose: Canonical, machine-readable form of the tiered Chromatic repo consolidation plan. Refreshed 2026-06-02 for current reality (dead repos removed, harness/wiki/governance-parent added). The harness reads this to know estate membership, canonical homes, and consolidation targets.
guardrails: No deletes in tiers 0-4 (deletes only at tier 5)
The Veil stays product/lore-focused; generic tooling moves out of product repos

doctrine.harness_stays_clean: chromatic-harness-v2 is the CONTROL PLANE, not a content/knowledge store. Do not migrate legacy repo contents into it.
doctrine.knowledge_home: chromatic-wiki — narrative docs and harvested learnings from retiring repos land here.
doctrine.migration_flow: harvest-code -> preserve-knowledge-to-wiki -> archive -> delete (deletes gated to tier 5)

status_key.CANONICAL: The canonical repo for this system — stays
status_key.ACTIVE_NICHE: Actively used niche repo — keep standalone
status_key.STANDALONE_CANONICAL: Stays as its own canonical repo (not merged)
status_key.STANDALONE_EXTERNAL: Third-party OSS fork — not part of the Chromatic platform
status_key.ARCHIVED_REDIRECT: Archived; content already redirected to merge_target
status_key.ARCHIVE_CANDIDATE: No active use — archive, then delete at tier 5
status_key.PUBLISHED_OSS: Public tool released to the world; not governed as internal estate

drift_since_v0_5_0: kas1987/Persona_Metadata_Atlas — 404 (no longer exists; was MERGE_CANDIDATE -> The-Veil)

repos.name: poly-chromatic
repos.action: Estate root: governance, specs, ChromaticTrees. Default branch fixed feat/* -> main 2026-06-02.

repos.name: chromatic-harness-v2
repos.action: Control-plane scaffold; KEEP public. Default fixed session/* -> main, pre-commit secret gate wired, pre-push E2E scoped+watchdogged 2026-06-02.
repos.notes: Newer than v0.5.0 plan; hosts this manifest.

repos.name: chromatic-wiki
repos.action: Estate knowledge home; harvested knowledge from retiring repos lands here (e.g. 05_ARCHIVE/image-org/ via wiki PR #25).

repos.name: chromatic-command-center
repos.action: Portfolio command hub (Electron). One operational front door. Holds the original v0.5.0 consolidation map + archived planning.

repos.name: prism-autonomy-harness
repos.action: Autonomy runtime. Default normalized Main -> main 2026-06-02.

repos.name: ChromaticSystems
repos.action: Governance & standards canonical home; receives CCP, Chromatic_Brain, chromatic-devsecops content.
repos.notes: Stays under kas1987 per plan (NOT moved to org).

repos.name: fusion-computer
repos.action: Artifact factory. Federation root. Optional: normalize master -> main.

repos.name: The-Veil
repos.action: Creative IP flagship. Stays product/lore-focused; generic tooling stays out.

repos.name: Image-Prism
repos.action: MetaChromatic monorepo IS the product. Canonical.
repos.notes: Built around the Image MetaHub concept; see Image-Org.

repos.name: Image-Org
repos.action: Third-party OSS fork (Image MetaHub, MPL-2.0). USER OVERRIDE 2026-06-02: stop tracking upstream -> archive then DELETE. Knowledge harvested to chromatic-wiki/05_ARCHIVE/image-org/ (wiki PR #25).
repos.notes: v0.5.0 had this STANDALONE_EXTERNAL (keep); user directed retirement. MPL-2.0 — deletion loses upstream link.

repos.name: 04-Prism
repos.action: MetaChromatic/ComfyUI ops workspace; active. Relates to Image-Prism.
